title: Kentucky targets prediction markets, puts red state in potential clash with Trump team
summary: President Donald Trump has taken the stance that states have no business with firms like Kalshi and Polymarket, and now a staunch GOP state is defying that view.

title: Fidelity joins Wall Street's race to manage stablecoin reserves
summary: Following State Street, Fidelity is targeting reserve assets that underpin the expanding stablecoin market.

title: Here is how Coinbase plan to survive the crypto downturn by ditching its reliance on trading fees
summary: Analysts say the exchange's push into derivatives, payments and infrastructure broadens its growth story beyond crypto trading.

title: Bitcoin layer-2s face a bear-market reality check
summary: Botanix's shutdown has raised an uncomfortable question for Bitcoin builders: Does the market actually want programmable BTC, or just a better way to borrow, lend and earn yield on it?

title: FIFA wanted Avalanche's blockchain to help curb World Cup ticket scalping. Here's how it's going
summary: In this week's edition of The Protocol Newsletter, we're looking at how FIFA is using the Avalanche blockchain to test out a new ticketing system.
